creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port x11-fm/caja fails to build with a linker error when building using poudriere on 12.1 Stable amd64 for me. 

Below is poudriere build log of the error:

4 warnings generated.
mv -f .deps/caja-connect-server-dialog-main.Tpo .deps/caja-connect-server-dialog-main.Po
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC   --mode=link cc  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing   -fstack-protector-strong  -o caja-autorun-software caja-autorun-software.o  ../src/file-manager/libcaja-file-manager.la ../libcaja-private/libcaja-private.la -L/usr/local/lib -Wl,--export-dynamic -lgmodule-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lmate-desktop-2 -lstartup-notification-1 -lgthread-2.0 -pthread -lglib-2.0 -lgailutil-3 -lxml2 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lpthread -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lintl -lX11  -L/usr/local/lib -lexif  -L/usr/local/lib -lexempi   -lnotify -lm -L/usr/local/lib
